title: CC narrative review S13 panel a2

payload.notes: S13 is the diagnosis beat of B08 "Wiki Rollback · centerpiece" (2x2 grid, sub-panel 2). Beat = ARIS returns to wiki, inspects the failure trace (keyword 'Tokyo' crossing schema boundary, sliced as Tok|yo); caption "Reset to the last good entry." narrative_beat_fidelity 4: the diagnosis/inspection beat reads and stays distinct from the S12 return-to-wiki pivot, the S14 K3->I-K3 invariant upgrade, and the S15 RE-RUN ENFORCED beat, so the 2x2 progression remains monotonic; downgraded one notch because the sliced-keyword trace ('Tok|yo' crossing the schema boundary) is the load-bearing diagnostic signal and it does not read as cleanly as it should at panel scale, softening the 'we found the bug' read. composition_story 5: reading order, duo legibility, and eye-flow toward the inspected failure trace all hold cleanly, and the top/left dark regions stay clear for the 'research-wiki :: rollback' system overlay. NARRATIVE VERDICT: diagnosis beat delivered and distinct (PASS on beat distinctness) — visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness are the visual reviewers' call; flagging only that the sliced-keyword trace must stay legible as the diagnostic payload.
